text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking down a tree-lined
street...
GRAWR!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Wha?! You dodged my bite attack?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Bleh! You're not the boss of me! I'm not gonna
listen to anything anyone says, and I won't lose to
anyone either!
choice_data_list:
But if you do that to the wrong person,
something bad might ha―

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I hear the approaching footsteps of my next
prey! Hehe! This one will be my best catch yet!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Now! GRAWR!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: EEEEEEK?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I WIN! YOU LOSE! Fear me, weakling!
I'mma bite'cha real good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! You're gonna give me even more of the
good stuff?! You don't skimp on the fan service at
all! Bite me more! Bite me moooore!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
...What? Why is she happy? Is she immune to my
bites or something?
choice_data_list: Guess this means you lost, huh?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
...What? Why is she happy? Is she immune to my
bites or something?
choice_data_list: Guess this means you lost, huh?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... So this is what you mean by something bad
might happen.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Then I'll just choose who I bite next!
choice_data_list: That's not my point at all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooooh... The bad girl Umas are on another level...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shinko Windy learns absolutely nothing from
today's events.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I'll never admit defeat! NEVER! I feel zero regret about this, you hear? I'm not gonna lose to anyone! Never! Never!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Grawr! Graaawr! GRAAAAAAWR!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh. My. Gosh. She's! SO! CUUUUUTE!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: She fainted! Yes! I did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear later that Shinko Windy went on a biting
spree after that... and got an earful from her dorm
leader, Hishi Amazon.
